disambiguation_rules.secretary: Inferred as Secretary of Transportation based on FAA authority context; appoints Associate Administrator for Advanced Aviation
disambiguation_rules.administrator: Inferred as FAA Administrator; receives quarterly workforce reports
disambiguation_rules.chief technology officer: Chief Technology Officer of the Federal Aviation Administration; develops enterprise architecture; proposes supporting system requirements
disambiguation_rules.director: In this section, refers to Director of Advanced Integration within Office of Advanced Integration; appointed by Associate Administrator in consultation with Administrator and Secretary
disambiguation_rules.executive director of the aircraft certi: Explicitly named role within FAA collaborating with Director of Advanced Integration
disambiguation_rules.executive director of the flight standar: Explicitly named role within FAA collaborating with Director of Advanced Integration
disambiguation_rules.director for air traffic services operat: Explicitly named FAA role distinct from Director of Advanced Integration
disambiguation_rules.vice president of technical operations: Explicitly named leadership position within Air Traffic Organization

parsing_rules: Notice of Objection process creates a formal escalation pathway: Associate Administrator → Administrator (30 days) → Secretary (30 days) → Congress notification. Objections suspend implementation of targeted rules/determinations.

oddities.note: Section 3 begins mid-document without clear demarcation; appears to be structural continuation rather than new major section.
